summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of LM Studio CORS server URL capabilities for LLM Council application. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/lm-studio/test endpoint tests connection and returns proper error for non-existent server
Settings page loads with LM Studio tab successfully
LM Studio tab displays model URL configuration inputs for all selected council models
Test connection buttons work and display appropriate error messages for invalid servers
Save LM Studio Configuration button is functional
Clear URL buttons work to remove configured URLs
LM Studio badge appears when URLs are configured
Frontend properly integrates with backend APIs using public URL
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (all LM Studio APIs working), Frontend: 100% (all UI components functional)
